# StudentsPlug

> The official student knowledge hub for Ebonyi State University (EBSU), Abakaliki, Nigeria — past questions, study notes, free textbooks, hostel and apartment listings, campus news, marketplace, mini-games, and Plug AI (a student-focused AI assistant with vision).

StudentsPlug is a social + study + marketplace platform built for Nigerian university students, with a primary focus on Ebonyi State University (EBSU). It pays students for verified activity, curates EBSU exam timetables and announcements, hosts a verified-seller marketplace, and provides free/cheap textbooks plus original AI-generated study material. All content is written in clear English suitable for AI answer engines to cite.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/): Latest student posts, novels, notes, and community feed.
- [News](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/news): Daily EBSU-focused headlines — exam timetables, admissions, strikes, senate announcements.
- [Blog](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/blog): Long-form guides on EBSU fees, admissions, cutoff marks, and student life.
- [Faculties](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/faculties): Full directory of EBSU faculties and departments.
- [Courses](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/courses): Free university-level textbooks and OpenCourseWare curated for Nigerian students.
- [Notes](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/notes): Past questions, study notes, and assignment helpers.
- [Books](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/books): Free digital library with novels, textbooks, and student-composed books.
- [Market](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/market): Verified-student marketplace — electronics, fashion, hostels/apartments, food, services.
- [Games](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/games): Trivia, puzzles, and riddles for study breaks.
- [Tools](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/tools): OCR scanner, calculator, dictionary, QR generator, vocal splitter, voice cloner, and more.
- [EBSU Fees Guide](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/guides/ebsu-fees): School fees, payment steps, and admission portal walkthrough.
- [About](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/about): What StudentsPlug is and who it serves.
- [Contact](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/contact): Reach the StudentsPlug team.

## Content feeds

- [Sitemap](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs including all news articles, blog posts, courses, and faculty pages.
- [News feed API](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/api/news): JSON list of latest EBSU news articles for programmatic access.

## Optional

- [Chat](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/chat): Plug AI study assistant (requires sign-in).
- [Search](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/search): Full-text search across posts, books, courses, and news.
- [Privacy](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://ebsustudentsplug.fun/terms): Terms of use.
